title: COPY BINARY INTO fails on 6gb file; works fine on 3gb
key_bug_features: COPY BINARY INTO fails on large file sizes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_large_file (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_large_file (data) VALUES (CAST('large_data' AS BLOB));
CREATE TABLE temp_data (foo DOUBLE, bar VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_data (foo, bar) SELECT 1.0, 'test' UNION ALL SELECT 2.0, NULL;
